case_title: RODAS, AROLDO VS PRIORITY PARKING SERVICES INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RODAS, AROLDO AS TO DEFENDANT PRIORITY PARKING SERVICES INC. PRIORITY PARKING-CA, LLC AKA PRIORITY PARKING SER- -VICES CA  LLC  AKA PRIORITY PARKING SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-14-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-04-2003 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED THAT PLTF IS TO REVIEW HIS TIME CARDS DURING DEFT'S NORMAL BUSINESS HRS UPON AT LEAST ONE DAY'S NOTICE TO DETERMINE THE EXACT DATE(S) FOR WHICH HE CLAIMS DAMAGES.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-12-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-05-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 MATTER WILL BE HEARD AT 9:00 AM IN RM 506. TO BE HEARD BY COMM. ARMOUR.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRIORITY PARKING SERVICES INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRIORITY PARKING-CA, LLC AKA PRIORITY PARKING SER-

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-04-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-12-2003 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANTS WILL PROVIDE THE COURT W/ PHOTOCOPIES OF THE TIME SHEETS THEY BROUGHT TO TODAY'S HEARING BY 12-12-03. THE COURT WILL THEN TRANSMIT THE PHOTOCOPIES & THE 12-4-03 DOCUMENT FURNISHED BY
- PLAINTIFF, TO COMM. ARMOUR TO DECIDE THE CASE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODAS, AROLDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRIORITY PARKING SERVICES INC. PRIORITY PARKING-CA, LLC AKA PRIORITY PARKING SER- -VICES CA  LLC  AKA PRIORITY PARKING SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
